The cron task "Reporte Trading 2h" is scheduled to run every 2 hours. It seems to be a trading report of some kind. Unfortunately without access to the full session history, I don't have enough information to provide a detailed summary. 

I'd recommend checking the gateway connection and trying to fetch the session history again. Once I can access the full context, I'll be happy to provide a more comprehensive report summary. Please let me know if you have any other questions!
